user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the side mirror with cracked glass, which aligns with the user's claim of damage to the side mirror. No evidence contradicts the claim.
claim_status_justification: The image img_1 clearly shows a cracked side mirror, which directly confirms the customer's report of damage to that specific part.
